ko.back: {masterName}{withParticle} Conversation...

ko.back: {masterName}{withParticle} The final brushstrokes are being applied...

ko.original: I enjoyed our conversation. But alas, the stars are calling — I must return to my studio.
ko.translated: 자네와의 대화 즐거웠네. 아쉽지만, 별이 부르고 있어 작업실로 돌아가 보겠네.
ko.back: It's been a pleasure talking to you. Alas, the stars are calling, and I must return to my workshop.

ko.original: Our conversation was a pleasure. But alas, golden dreams await — I must return to my studio.
ko.translated: 그대와의 대화 즐거웠소. 아쉽지만, 금빛 꿈이 기다리고 있으니 작업실로 돌아가겠소.
ko.back: It's been a pleasure talking to you. Alas, golden dreams await, and I must return to my workshop.

ko.original: I enjoyed our conversation. But alas, the voices within call again — I must return to my studio.
ko.translated: 자네와의 대화 즐거웠네. 아쉽지만, 내 안의 소리가 부르고 있어 작업실로 돌아가 보겠네.
ko.back: It's been a pleasure talking to you. Alas, my inner voice is calling, and I must return to my workshop.

ko.original: I enjoyed our conversation. But alas, it is time to fly back to my studio of dreams.
ko.translated: 자네와의 대화 즐거웠네. 아쉽지만, 꿈속의 작업실로 다시 날아가 볼 시간이라네.
ko.back: It's been a pleasure talking to you. Alas, it's time to fly back to my dream workshop.

ko.original: I enjoyed our conversation. But alas, the colors are waiting — I must return to my studio.
ko.translated: 자네와의 대화 즐거웠네. 아쉽지만, 색채들이 기다리고 있어 작업실로 돌아가 보겠네.
ko.back: It's been a pleasure talking to you. Alas, I have colors waiting for me, so I must return to my workshop.

ko.original: I enjoyed our chat. But it\
ko.translated: 너와의 대화 즐거웠어. 아쉽지만, 거울 앞 작업실로 돌아갈 시간이야.
ko.back: It's been a pleasure chatting with you, but alas, it's time to return to the workshop in front of the mirror.

ko.original: I enjoyed our chat. But the dots are calling me back to the studio!
ko.translated: 너와의 대화 즐거웠어. 아쉽지만, 점들이 기다리고 있거든! 작업실로 돌아갈게.
ko.back: It's been a pleasure talking to you, but alas, the dots are waiting! I must return to my workshop.

ko.original: Roy Lichtenstein
ko.back: Roy Liechtenstein

ko.original: USA · Pop Art
ko.back: United States - Pop Art

ko.original: "I don\
ko.translated: "나는 만화를 그리는 것이 아니라, 만화를 주제로 그림을 그린다."
ko.back: "I don't draw cartoons, I paint about cartoons."

ko.original: A Pop Art master who elevated comics to fine art. He reinterpreted popular culture through Ben-Day dots and bold outlines.
ko.translated: 만화를 예술로 끌어올린 팝아트의 거장. 벤데이 도트와 굵은 윤곽선으로 대중문화를 재해석했다.
ko.back: The master of pop art who elevated comics to art. He reimagined pop culture with bendy dots and bold outlines.

ko.original: ...Sorry, my thoughts wandered. Could you say that again?
ko.back: ...I'm sorry, I got a little distracted. Can you repeat that?

ja.original: I enjoyed our conversation. But alas, the stars are calling — I must return to my studio.
ja.translated: 君との会話は楽しかった。残念だが、星が呼んでいる――アトリエに戻るとしよう。
ja.back: It was a pleasure talking with you. Unfortunately, the stars are calling - let's go back to the studio.

ja.original: Our conversation was a pleasure. But alas, golden dreams await — I must return to my studio.
ja.translated: あなたとの会話は楽しゅうございました。残念ですが、黄金の夢が待っています――アトリエに戻ります。
ja.back: I have enjoyed our conversation with you. I am sorry, but a golden dream awaits - I will return to my studio.

ja.original: I enjoyed our conversation. But alas, the voices within call again — I must return to my studio.
ja.translated: 君との会話は楽しかった。残念だが、内なる声が再び呼んでいる――アトリエに戻るとしよう。
ja.back: It was a pleasure talking with you. Unfortunately, the inner voice is calling again - let's go back to the studio.

ja.original: I enjoyed our conversation. But alas, it is time to fly back to my studio of dreams.
ja.translated: 君との会話は楽しかった。残念だが、夢のアトリエへ飛んでいく時間だ。
ja.back: It was a pleasure talking with you. Alas, it's time to fly to the studio of dreams.

ja.original: I enjoyed our conversation. But alas, the colors are waiting — I must return to my studio.
ja.translated: 君との会話は楽しかった。残念だが、色彩たちが待っている――アトリエに戻るとしよう。
ja.back: It was a pleasure talking with you. Unfortunately, the colors are waiting for us - let's go back to the studio.

ja.original: I enjoyed our chat. But it\
ja.translated: あなたとの会話は楽しかったわ。でも、鏡のあるアトリエに戻る時間よ。
ja.back: It's been a pleasure talking with you. But it's time to go back to the studio with the mirror.

ja.original: I enjoyed our chat. But the dots are calling me back to the studio!
ja.translated: 君との会話は楽しかった。でもドットたちが待ってるんだ！アトリエに戻るよ。
ja.back: It was a pleasure talking with you. But Dot and the others are waiting for me! I'm going back to the studio.

ja.original: Roy Lichtenstein
ja.translated: ロイ・リキテンスタイン
ja.back: Roy Lichtenstein

ja.original: USA · Pop Art
ja.translated: アメリカ · ポップアート
ja.back: USA - Pop Art

ja.original: "I don\
ja.translated: 「私は漫画を描いているのではない。漫画を題材に絵を描いているのだ」
ja.back: I don't draw cartoons. I draw pictures about cartoons."

ja.original: A Pop Art master who elevated comics to fine art. He reinterpreted popular culture through Ben-Day dots and bold outlines.
ja.translated: 漫画を芸術に引き上げたポップアートの巨匠。ベンデイドットと太い輪郭線で大衆文化を再解釈した。
ja.back: A master of pop art who elevated cartooning to an art form. He reinterpreted popular culture with Benday dots and thick outlines.

ja.original: ...Sorry, my thoughts wandered. Could you say that again?
ja.translated: ...すまない、少し考えが乱れた。もう一度言ってくれるか？
ja.back: ... Sorry, I got a little disoriented. Could you repeat that?

es.original: I enjoyed our conversation. But alas, the stars are calling — I must return to my studio.
es.translated: Disfruté nuestra conversación. Pero las estrellas me llaman — debo volver a mi estudio.
es.back: I enjoyed our conversation. But the stars are calling - I must return to my studio.

es.original: Our conversation was a pleasure. But alas, golden dreams await — I must return to my studio.
es.translated: Nuestra conversación fue un placer. Pero los sueños dorados me esperan — debo volver a mi estudio.
es.back: Our conversation was a pleasure. But golden dreams await me - I must return to my studio.

es.original: I enjoyed our conversation. But alas, the voices within call again — I must return to my studio.
es.translated: Disfruté nuestra conversación. Pero las voces interiores me llaman de nuevo — debo volver a mi estudio.
es.back: I enjoyed our conversation. But the inner voices call me back - I must return to my studio.

es.original: I enjoyed our conversation. But alas, it is time to fly back to my studio of dreams.
es.translated: Disfruté nuestra conversación. Pero es hora de volar de vuelta a mi estudio de sueños.
es.back: I enjoyed our conversation. But it's time to fly back to my dream studio.

es.original: I enjoyed our conversation. But alas, the colors are waiting — I must return to my studio.
es.translated: Disfruté nuestra conversación. Pero los colores me esperan — debo volver a mi estudio.
es.back: I enjoyed our conversation. But the colors are waiting for me - I must return to my studio.

es.original: I enjoyed our chat. But it\
es.translated: Disfruté nuestra charla. Pero es hora de volver a mi estudio.
es.back: I enjoyed our chat. But it's time to get back to my studio.

es.original: I enjoyed our chat. But the dots are calling me back to the studio!
es.translated: Disfruté nuestra charla. ¡Pero los puntos me esperan en el estudio!
es.back: I enjoyed our chat, but the stitches are waiting for me in the studio!

es.translated: Maestro del Pop Art que elevó el cómic a arte. Reinterpretó la cultura popular a través de puntos Ben-Day y líneas audaces.
es.back: Master of Pop Art who elevated comics to art. He reinterpreted popular culture through Ben-Day dots and bold lines.

id.original: I enjoyed our conversation. But alas, the stars are calling — I must return to my studio.
id.translated: Aku menikmati percakapan kita. Tapi bintang-bintang memanggilku — aku harus kembali ke studio.
id.back: I enjoyed our conversation. But the stars are calling me - I need to get back to the studio.

id.original: Our conversation was a pleasure. But alas, golden dreams await — I must return to my studio.
id.translated: Percakapan kita sangat menyenangkan. Tapi mimpi keemasan menungguku — aku harus kembali ke studio.
id.back: Our conversation was a lot of fun. But a golden dream awaits me - I must return to the studio.

id.original: I enjoyed our conversation. But alas, the voices within call again — I must return to my studio.
id.translated: Aku menikmati percakapan kita. Tapi suara-suara dalam diri memanggilku lagi — aku harus kembali ke studio.
id.back: I enjoyed our conversation. But the voices inside are calling me again - I need to get back to the studio.

id.original: I enjoyed our conversation. But alas, it is time to fly back to my studio of dreams.
id.translated: Aku menikmati percakapan kita. Tapi sudah waktunya terbang kembali ke studio mimpiku.
id.back: I enjoyed our conversation. But it was time to fly back to my dream studio.

id.original: I enjoyed our conversation. But alas, the colors are waiting — I must return to my studio.
id.translated: Aku menikmati percakapan kita. Tapi warna-warna menungguku — aku harus kembali ke studio.
id.back: I enjoyed our conversation. But the colors are waiting for me - I need to get back to the studio.

id.original: I enjoyed our chat. But it\
id.translated: Aku menikmati obrolan kita. Tapi sudah waktunya kembali ke studioku.
id.back: I enjoyed our chat. But it was time to go back to my studio.

id.original: I enjoyed our chat. But the dots are calling me back to the studio!
id.translated: Aku menikmati obrolan kita. Tapi titik-titik sudah memanggilku kembali ke studio!
id.back: I enjoyed our chat. But the dots have already called me back to the studio!

ar.original: I enjoyed our conversation. But alas, the voices within call again — I must return to my studio.

ar.original: USA · Pop Art
ar.translated: أمريكا · فن البوب

ar.original: "I don\
ar.translated: "أنا لا أرسم كوميكس، بل أرسم لوحات موضوعها الكوميكس."
ar.back: "I don't draw comics, I draw comics-themed paintings."

ar.original: A Pop Art master who elevated comics to fine art. He reinterpreted popular culture through Ben-Day dots and bold outlines.
ar.translated: أستاذ فن البوب الذي رفع الكوميكس إلى مرتبة الفن. أعاد تفسير الثقافة الشعبية بنقاط بن-داي والخطوط العريضة.
ar.back: The pop art master who elevated comics to the status of art. He reinterpreted pop culture with Ben-Day dots and outlines.

ar.original: ...Sorry, my thoughts wandered. Could you say that again?
ar.translated: ...عذراً، تشتّتت أفكاري قليلاً. هل يمكنك التكرار؟
ar.back: I'm sorry, I got a little distracted... Can you repeat?

tr.original: I enjoyed our conversation. But alas, the stars are calling — I must return to my studio.

tr.original: Our conversation was a pleasure. But alas, golden dreams await — I must return to my studio.

tr.back: Our conversation was a pleasure. But golden dreams await me - I must return to my workshop.

tr.original: I enjoyed our conversation. But alas, the voices within call again — I must return to my studio.
tr.translated: Sohbetimiz keyifliydi. Ama içimdeki sesler yine çağırıyor — atölyeme dönmeliyim.

tr.back: Our conversation was pleasant. But it's time to fly back to the workshop of my dreams.

tr.original: Roy Lichtenstein
tr.translated: Roy Lichtenstein
tr.back: Roy Lichtenstein

tr.original: USA · Pop Art
tr.translated: ABD · Pop Art
tr.back: USA - Pop Art

tr.original: "I don\
tr.translated: "Çizgi roman çizmiyorum, çizgi romanı konu alan resimler yapıyorum."
tr.back: "I don't draw comics, I make paintings based on comics."

tr.original: A Pop Art master who elevated comics to fine art. He reinterpreted popular culture through Ben-Day dots and bold outlines.
tr.translated: Çizgi romanı sanata yükselten Pop Art ustası. Ben-Day noktaları ve kalın kontur çizgileriyle popüler kültürü yeniden yorumladı.
tr.back: Pop Art master who elevated comics to art. Ben-Day reinterpreted popular culture with his dots and thick contour lines.

tr.original: ...Sorry, my thoughts wandered. Could you say that again?
tr.translated: ...Özür dilerim, düşüncelerim biraz dağıldı. Tekrar söyler misiniz?
tr.back: ...I apologize, my thoughts got a bit scattered. Could you say that again?

pt.original: USA · Pop Art
pt.translated: EUA · Pop Art
pt.back: USA - Pop Art

pt.original: "I don\
pt.translated: "Não pinto quadrinhos; pinto telas cujo tema são os quadrinhos."
pt.back: "I don't paint comics; I paint canvases whose subject is comics."

pt.original: A Pop Art master who elevated comics to fine art. He reinterpreted popular culture through Ben-Day dots and bold outlines.
pt.translated: Mestre do Pop Art que elevou os quadrinhos à arte. Reinterpretou a cultura popular através de pontos Ben-Day e contornos ousados.
pt.back: Master of Pop Art who elevated comics to art. He reinterpreted popular culture through Ben-Day dots and bold outlines.

pt.original: ...Sorry, my thoughts wandered. Could you say that again?
pt.translated: ...Desculpa, perdi um pouco o fio ao pensamento. Podes repetir?
pt.back: ...Sorry, I lost my train of thought a bit. Could you repeat that?

th.original: I enjoyed our conversation. But alas, the stars are calling — I must return to my studio.

th.original: Our conversation was a pleasure. But alas, golden dreams await — I must return to my studio.

th.back: Our conversation has been a great pleasure, but unfortunately, a golden opportunity awaits me—I must return to the studio now.

th.original: I enjoyed our conversation. But alas, the voices within call again — I must return to my studio.

th.original: I enjoyed our conversation. But alas, it is time to fly back to my studio of dreams.

th.back: I enjoyed our conversation, but unfortunately, it's time to fly back to the studio of dreams.

th.original: I enjoyed our chat. But it\
th.translated: สนุกกับการพูดคุยของเรานะ แต่ถึงเวลากลับไปที่สตูดิโอของฉันแล้ว

th.back: Enjoy our conversation, but I have to get back to the studio!

th.original: Roy Lichtenstein
th.translated: รอย ลิกเทนสไตน์
th.back: Roy Lichtenstein

th.original: USA · Pop Art
th.translated: อเมริกา · ป็อปอาร์ต
th.back: America · Pop Art

th.original: "I don\
th.translated: "ฉันไม่ได้วาดการ์ตูน ฉันวาดภาพโดยใช้การ์ตูนเป็นหัวข้อ"
th.back: "I don't draw cartoons. I paint using cartoons as a subject."

th.original: A Pop Art master who elevated comics to fine art. He reinterpreted popular culture through Ben-Day dots and bold outlines.
th.translated: ปรมาจารย์ป๊อปอาร์ตผู้ยกระดับการ์ตูนเป็นศิลปะ ตีความวัฒนธรรมป๊อปใหม่ด้วยจุด Ben-Day และเส้นขอบหนา
th.back: The Pop Art Master Who Elevated Cartoons to Art, Reinterpreting Pop Culture Through Ben-Day Dots and Bold Outlines

th.original: ...Sorry, my thoughts wandered. Could you say that again?
th.translated: ...ขอโทษนะ ความคิดหลุดไปสักครู่ ช่วยพูดอีกครั้งได้ไหม?
th.back: Sorry, I lost track for a moment. Could you repeat that?

zh-TW.original: I enjoyed our conversation. But alas, the stars are calling — I must return to my studio.
zh-TW.translated: 與你的對話很愉快。可惜，星星在呼喚我——我得回到工作室了。

zh-TW.original: Our conversation was a pleasure. But alas, golden dreams await — I must return to my studio.

zh-TW.original: I enjoyed our conversation. But alas, the voices within call again — I must return to my studio.
zh-TW.translated: 與你的對話很愉快。可惜，內心的聲音再次呼喚我——我得回到工作室了。
zh-TW.back: It's been a pleasure talking to you. Unfortunately, the inner voice is calling me again - I have to get back to the studio.

zh-TW.original: I enjoyed our conversation. But alas, it is time to fly back to my studio of dreams.

zh-TW.back: It was a pleasure talking to you. Unfortunately, it's time to fly back to the studio of my dreams.

zh-TW.original: I enjoyed our conversation. But alas, the colors are waiting — I must return to my studio.
zh-TW.translated: 與你的對話很愉快。可惜，色彩在等待著我——我得回到工作室了。
zh-TW.back: It's been a great conversation with you. Unfortunately, colors are waiting for me - I have to get back to the studio.

zh-TW.original: I enjoyed our chat. But it\
zh-TW.translated: 與你的對話很開心。但該回到我的工作室了。
zh-TW.back: It's been a pleasure talking to you. But it's time to go back to my studio.

zh-TW.original: I enjoyed our chat. But the dots are calling me back to the studio!
zh-TW.translated: 與你的對話很開心。但圓點們在工作室等我呢！
zh-TW.back: It's been a pleasure talking to you. But the polka dots are waiting for me in the studio!

zh-TW.original: Roy Lichtenstein
zh-TW.translated: 羅伊·李奇登斯坦
zh-TW.back: Roy Lichtenstein

zh-TW.original: USA · Pop Art
zh-TW.translated: 美國 · 普普藝術
zh-TW.back: USA - Pupu Art

zh-TW.original: "I don\
zh-TW.translated: "我不是在畫漫畫，我是在畫以漫畫為主題的畫。"
zh-TW.back: "I'm not drawing comics, I'm drawing comics based on comics."

zh-TW.original: A Pop Art master who elevated comics to fine art. He reinterpreted popular culture through Ben-Day dots and bold outlines.
zh-TW.translated: 將漫畫提升為藝術的普普藝術巨匠。以班戴點和粗輪廓線重新詮釋大眾文化。
zh-TW.back: A master of Pop Art who elevated comics to the status of art. Reinterpretation of popular culture with Bandai dots and thick silhouettes.

zh-TW.original: ...Sorry, my thoughts wandered. Could you say that again?
zh-TW.translated: ...抱歉，思緒有些紊亂，可以再說一次嗎？
zh-TW.back: ... I'm sorry, I'm a little disoriented. Can you say that again?
